translations.- Okayama Momotaro Airport is a very sma:
- Okayama Momotaro Airport is a very small airport, with only one international flight at a time (yours). You go through immigration and collect your luggage quickly along with other passengers.  
  (This flight seemed nearly full, and it took about 30 minutes to get out.)

- Unexpectedly, the airport staff all speak Chinese.

- It might be because smaller airports are stricter. Almost every solo traveler like me was asked how many days they would stay and which places they planned to visit. Some were even required to show hotel reservations.  
  (So if you're traveling alone, prepare these in advance.)

translations.- The airport is small, and just follow:
- The airport is small, just follow the signs to find the bus to Okayama Station. Staff will guide you, so don’t worry about getting lost—just get on the bus.

- **There are very few flights, so besides the scheduled bus times, extra buses are added based on flight arrivals; don’t worry about full buses, as more will be dispatched if needed.**

- [Show your passport before 2024/11/30](https://www.ptt.cc/bbs/Japan_Travel/M.1730096575.A.AB6.html){:target="_blank"} to ride free; free shuttle service runs irregularly, [it was not available last year](../31b9b3a63abc/).

translations.1. Go to the eSIM voucher email or PDF,:
1. Go to the eSIM voucher email or PDF, take a screenshot on your phone, and save the screenshot in your photo album.

2. Open the phone camera, tap the bottom left corner to enter the photo album.

3. Find the eSIM photo in the album, long press the QR code, and the "Add eSIM" option will appear.

4. Click "Add eSIM" to directly load the activation information and activate the eSIM.

translations.一出來看到姬路城夜景覺得很美，不知道發什麼神經想走到姬路城拍夜景，太接近反而不好: As soon as I came out, I saw the night view of Himeji Castle and thought it was beautiful. For some reason, I decided to walk to Himeji Castle to take night photos. Being too close made it hard to frame the shots, so I didn’t take many photos and left quickly. It was cold and I was hungry the whole way—I should have just gone straight to eat.
translations.一早先把行李寄放在飯店，到松江公車站搭公車去松江城遊船。\n\n: In the morning, first leave the luggage at the hotel, then take the bus from Matsue Bus Station to the Matsue Castle boat tour.
translations.一樓只有有一家伴手禮店其他什麼都沒有， [跟去年一樣](../31b9b3a63: The first floor only has a souvenir shop and nothing else. [Just like last year](../31b9b3a63abc/), I bought a peach mochi to eat.
translations.一樓有 [熊本熊](../d78e0b15a08a/) 活動。\n\n: There is a [Kumamon](../d78e0b15a08a/) event on the first floor.
translations.一路上會經過宍到湖，超級大一開始以為是海，其實是湖。\n\n: Along the way, we passed by Lake Shinji, which is so large that I initially thought it was the sea, but it's actually a lake.
translations.一路吹風遊河很愜意，船夫也會一路介紹四周景點歷史(雖然我只聽得懂左邊hidari: Cruising along the river with the breeze was very relaxing. The boatman also introduced the history of the surrounding sights along the way (although I only understood "hidari" for left and "migi" for right...).
translations.一路從停車場這邊出來，可以看到對面由隈研吾操刀的鳥取砂丘「Takahama Ca: Exiting from the parking lot, you can see across the street the Tottori Sand Dunes "Takahama Cafe 高濱咖啡廳," designed by Kengo Kuma.
translations.上圖拿去年去兌換的 JR Pass 為圖例\n\n: The above image uses last year's JR Pass redemption as an example.
translations.下午 13:05 的飛機，早上 8 點起床快 9 點出門，時間上綽綽有餘。\n\: The flight is at 13:05. Woke up at 8 AM and left around 9 AM, plenty of time.
translations.下山走回來的時候的公車站，大約 11:05，等 11:10 公車回姬路市區。\n: The bus stop when walking back down the mountain, around 11:05, waiting for the 11:10 bus back to Himeji city.
translations.下車前依照螢幕顯示金額投幣，我們是總站上車的無券所以看第一格前一格的金額付錢。\: Before getting off, insert coins according to the amount shown on the screen. Since we boarded at the last stop without a ticket, we paid the amount shown in the first section before the previous one.
translations.下車後一路往前走就是足立美術館入口。\n\n: After getting off, walk straight ahead to reach the entrance of Adachi Museum of Art.
translations.下車後回頭岔路依照指標往上經過鳥取沙丘美術館繼續走到鳥取沙丘入口。\n\n: After getting off, turn back at the fork and follow the signs uphill, passing the Tottori Sand Dunes Art Museum, then continue to the entrance of the Tottori Sand Dunes.
translations.下車後就是纜車搭乘處，在自動售票機買完來回票就能排隊等纜車了。(15 分鐘一班): After getting off, you will find the cable car station. After buying a round-trip ticket from the vending machine, you can line up to wait for the cable car. (Runs every 15 minutes)
translations.下車後往回天橋方向走就是白兔神社入口。\n\n: After getting off, walk back towards the overpass to reach the entrance of Hakuto Shrine.
translations.不過還好中途有一家 7–11 買了熱狗跟炸雞、飲料邊吃邊等夕陽。\n\n: Fortunately, there was a 7–11 along the way where I bought a hot dog, fried chicken, and drinks to enjoy while waiting for the sunset.
translations.不過還好是一大早體力精神還很充沛，坡度平緩就一路走走賞楓上山了。\n\n: Fortunately, it was early in the morning and I still had plenty of energy and spirit, so I walked up the gentle slope while enjoying the autumn leaves.
translations.主要是來摸卡皮巴拉，加上時間不太夠所以沒有停留太久。\n\n: The main purpose was to see the capybaras, and since time was limited, the stay was brief.
translations.乃木站非常小，沒有站務員也沒有檢票機， **持 JR Pass 搭乘就直接出站就: Nogi Station is very small, with no staff or ticket gates. **If you have a JR Pass, just exit directly without leaving your JR Pass in the ticket box. ⚠️⚠️⚠️**
translations.之前來第一航廈每次都吃頂呱呱，這次改吃老董牛肉麵，店面位置就在快到 A1 登機門: Every time I came to Terminal 1 before, I always ate at Ding Gua Gua. This time, I switched to Lao Dong Beef Noodles, which is conveniently located near Gate A1.
translations.之前去 [泰國買的 eSIM 可以直接在購買憑證信、PDF 或截圖照片中長按 Q: Previously, the eSIM bought in [Thailand could be added automatically by long-pressing the QR Code in the purchase confirmation email, PDF, or screenshot and tapping "Add eSIM"](../b7e7c0938985/), but this time the Japanese eSIM did not show this option:
translations.也可點「目標內容」查看可兌換項目。\n\n: You can also click "Target Content" to view redeemable items.
translations.也在這邊買了一些鳥取伴手禮。\n\n: I also bought some souvenirs from Tottori here.
translations.也有幾家店有賣吉伊卡哇。\n\n: There are also a few shops selling Jiikawa.
translations.也花了 500 日圓買了姻緣石去雕像擺放。\n\n: I also spent 500 yen to buy a matchmaking stone to place at the statue.
translations.二樓在整修只剩部分店有開， [去年能去的觀景平台](../31b9b3a63ab: The second floor is under renovation, with only a few shops open. The observation deck that was accessible last year ([last year's visit](../31b9b3a63abc/)) seems to be closed; however, there is still at least one souvenir shop and several food outlets.
translations.人看起來都很渺小，一路走到沙丘脊上，有點抖而且沙子很鬆散不好走。\n\n: People look very small. Walking all the way up to the dune ridge was a bit shaky, and the sand was loose and hard to walk on.
translations.今年 2024 的岡山後樂園點燈是 11月15日(金)～11月24日(日)，來的: The 2024 illumination at Okayama Korakuen Garden is from November 15th (Fri) to November 24th (Sun). It wasn't on yet when I visited, but if it's lit, it's worth seeing as it's very beautiful.
translations.今年岡山有 [藝術季活動](https://forestartfest-okay: This year, Okayama is hosting an [arts festival](https://forestartfest-okayama.jp/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.今年比較溫暖還沒有換暖桌船\n: This year is warmer, so the heated kotatsu boat has not been set up yet.
translations.今年沒有特別搶虎航秋季活動機票， **去年有買到優惠機票** 時間比較好又比較便: This year, I didn't specifically rush to buy Tigerair's autumn promo tickets. **Last year, I got discounted tickets** with better timing and lower prices ( `Last year: Departure (11:10), Return (15:25), including 20KG checked baggage each way + seat selection + fees: NT$ 7,012` ).
translations.來到 13 樓這邊有寶可夢中心、大阪任天堂、CAPCOM…\n\n: On the 13th floor, there is a Pokémon Center, Nintendo Osaka, CAPCOM…
translations.來這邊的目的達成，來摸卡皮巴拉，好肥、毛摸起來好粗糙很像掃把。\n\n: The purpose of coming here is achieved: to touch the capybaras. They are so fat, and their fur feels rough like a broom.
translations.依照 Google Map 搭乘白兔海岸線鹿野營業所 41 前往 白兔神社前。\: Take the Hakuto Coast Line bus No. 41 from Shikano Office to Hakuto Shrine-mae according to Google Maps.
translations.依照地點不同可以搭不同的車回家，之前是搭國光直接回台北，這次我要搭大有巴士 11: Depending on the location, you can take different buses home. Previously, I took the Kuo-Kuang Bus directly back to Taipei. This time, I will take the Dayou Bus 11 platform back to New Taipei.
translations.便當的份量有點少、岡山白桃這罐水蜜桃酒很好喝！再加上懷念的日本超商(全家的)熱狗: The bento portion was a bit small, but the Okayama white peach peach wine was very tasty! Along with the nostalgic Japanese convenience store (FamilyMart) hot dog and fried chicken, tonight was very satisfying. Good night, Okayama! Fully prepared to wake up early tomorrow and start the Japan trip.
translations.保存好登機證，憑此去機場就可以直接排「行李自助托運」掛行李，不用浪費時間排長長的: Keep your boarding pass safe. With it, you can go straight to the "Self-Service Baggage Drop" at the airport to check in your luggage without waiting in the long "Regular Check-in" lines.
translations.倒水跟丟棄物品的地方也就只是個箱子。\n\n: The place for pouring water and disposing of items is just a box.
translations.候機室不大，只有一家免稅店，有賣一些伴手禮、菸酒品相不多。\n\n: The waiting lounge is small, with only one duty-free shop that sells some souvenirs and a limited selection of tobacco and alcohol.
translations.價格： `NT$ 3,779` 多送一張 [**山陰山陽地區PASS周遊3日券: Price: `NT$ 3,779` Includes an extra [**San'in-Sanyo Area Pass 3-Day Ticket (Great value when used together)**](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/20307-jr-sanin-okayama-area-pass?cid=19365){:target="_blank"}
translations.先去 [去年來京阪神](../76d66c2e34af/) 沒去到的難波八阪神社: First, visit [Namba Yasaka Shrine](../76d66c2e34af/) in Kansai, which I missed last year.
translations.先往左邊去鳥取沙丘展望台看風景、吃東西，會先到纜車上下車處。\n\n: First, head left to the Tottori Sand Dunes Observatory to enjoy the view and have some food. You will arrive at the cable car boarding area first.
translations.先查好出發地點的英文名與要去的地方 **JR 站英文名** ，例如：OKAYAM: First, check the English names of your departure point and destination **JR station names**, for example: OKAYAMA (岡山) -> MATSUE (松江)
translations.兌換完會有三張券，其他兩張長方形的是說明書，沒有用； **印有 PASS 的這張: After redemption, you will receive three vouchers. The other two rectangular ones are instruction sheets and are not useful; **the one printed with PASS is the most important. You need this for entering and exiting stations, so keep it safe!**
translations.全家的這個果肉果汁每次來日本必喝！\n\n: This pulp juice from FamilyMart is a must-drink every time I visit Japan!
translations.全程約 50 分鐘\n: The entire trip takes about 50 minutes
translations.公車下車後往前走一點就是姬路城遊船，不過天氣陰陰快下雨就沒去了。\n\n: After getting off the bus, walk a bit ahead to reach the Himeji Castle boat tour. However, since the weather was gloomy and it looked like rain, I didn't go.
translations.公車班次太少只能用走的去，大約要 15 分鐘，途中會經過出雲阿國之墓，一路走到底: The bus service is infrequent, so walking is the only option. It takes about 15 minutes, passing by Izumo Okuni's grave along the way. Walking all the way leads to Inasa Beach.
translations.公車要等到 10:45 才有往鳥取站方向的，覺得比較好的時間是更早來搭更早的車回: The bus only departs towards Tottori Station at 10:45. It's better to arrive earlier and take an earlier bus to save time.
translations.其他步驟照以下影片示範完成預約：\n: Complete the reservation by following the steps shown in the video below:
translations.出城後一路走回三之丸廣場然後走出來外面。\n\n: After leaving the castle, walk back to Sannomaru Plaza and then exit outside.
translations.出岡山車站走 4 分鐘就會到\n\n: It's a 4-minute walk from Okayama Station.
translations.出站先去 LINKS 百貨，五樓可以直通 Yodobashi 扭蛋玩具區。\n\: After exiting the station, head to LINKS Department Store. The 5th floor connects directly to the Yodobashi gacha toy area.
translations.出站後直接去飯店 [**東橫INN 姬路站新幹線北口**](https://ww: After exiting the station, head straight to the hotel [**Toyoko INN Himeji Station Shinkansen North Exit**](https://www.toyoko-inn.com/china/search/detail/00317/){:target="_blank"}. The last three nights were all spent here. The Toyoko INN near the north exit is livelier; it looks close on the map but feels a bit farther when walking, taking about 10 minutes.
translations.出站才發現就是天上跑的這條，從二樓三宮站入站。\n\n: Only after exiting the station did I realize this is the one that runs in the sky, entering from the second floor of Sannomiya Station.
translations.出站穿過地下道、商店街繼續往前走就會看到通天閣塔。\n\n: After exiting the station, go through the underground passage and shopping street, then continue straight to see Tsutenkaku Tower.
translations.出雲大社公車站在紀念品店穿過廁所後面這邊，小小的一開始一直很怕等錯。\n\n: The Izumo Taisha bus stop is located behind the restrooms, past the souvenir shop. It's small, so at first I was worried about waiting at the wrong spot.
translations.分配到 14 樓頂樓的房間，窗外視野很好。\n\n: Assigned a room on the 14th-floor rooftop, with a great view outside the window.
translations.切換到「使用」填寫健康問券，填完會出現 QR Code 相機；掃描店家提供的 Q: Switch to "Use" to fill out the health questionnaire. After completing it, a QR Code camera will appear; scan the QR Code provided by the store and show them the result to complete the redemption.
translations.到安來站先別急著出站，找到觀光案內所可以寄放大型行李。\n(車站外有自動置物櫃但:
Don't rush to exit at Yasugi Station. Find the tourist information center to store large luggage.  
(There are coin lockers outside the station, but they are mostly full.)
translations.到新大阪後還要走一下到御堂筋線。\n\n: After arriving at Shin-Osaka, you still need to walk to the Midosuji Line.
translations.到新幹線站準備搭乘 08:52 的新幹線前往岡山。\n\n: Arrived at the Shinkansen station to catch the 08:52 Shinkansen bound for Okayama.
translations.到車站後同樣去劃位 Yakumo 14 指定席前往 安来(安來) (足立美術館): After arriving at the station, also reserve a seat on Yakumo 14 reserved seat bound for Yasugi (Adachi Museum of Art).
translations.前往 eSIM 憑證信、PDF 按下手機截圖，將截圖存在照片相簿中\n: Go to the eSIM voucher email or PDF, take a screenshot on your phone, and save the screenshot in your photo album.
translations.前往今晚的飯店 [**東橫INN 鳥取站南口**](https://www.to: Head to tonight's hotel [**Toyoko INN Tottori Station South Exit**](https://www.toyoko-inn.com/china/search/detail/00046/){:target="_blank"}. There is also a Toyoko INN at the North Exit, but I couldn't book there. The North Exit area has a livelier shopping street.
translations.剛好遇到他們的議員選舉，站外有議員在造勢演講，人很多。\n\n: I happened to catch their councilor election campaign outside, where a councilor was giving a rally speech with a large crowd.
translations.劃到 Green Car 第一排座位，很舒適。\n\n: Got a seat in the first row of the Green Car, very comfortable.
translations.去二樓找扭蛋也去二手商店看看有沒有我要的烏薩奇。\n\n: Go to the second floor to look for capsule toys and check the second-hand store to see if they have the Usagi I want.
translations.去：13:05 TPE 台北桃園國際機場-&gt; **16:30 OKJ**: Departure: 13:05 TPE Taipei Taoyuan International Airport -> **16:30 OKJ** Okayama Momotaro Airport
translations.參拜完後拿了一本印章搜集簿，蓋出雲大社紀念章。\n\n: After the visit, I got a stamp collection book and stamped the Izumo Taisha commemorative seal.
translations.參觀完大講堂後折返回摩尼殿，在摩尼殿外的商店買了一個現烤紅豆麻糬補充體力。(現烤: After visiting the Great Lecture Hall, I returned to the Mani Hall and bought a freshly grilled red bean mochi at the shop outside to recharge. (The freshly grilled one was delicious, with a crispy skin)
translations.另一區還有袋鼠、羊近距離互動。\n\n: In another area, there are kangaroos and sheep for close-up interactions.
translations.可以一起參考山陽地區遊記，有時間的話可以山陽＋山陰一起玩。\n\n: You can also refer to the Sanyo area travelogue. If you have time, you can explore both Sanyo and Sanin regions together.
translations.可以先到販賣及旁邊這邊拿刷子清理鞋子的沙子。(門口工作人員也會提醒)\n\n: You can first go to the vending area and use the brush nearby to clean the sand off your shoes. (The staff at the entrance will also remind you.)
translations.可以吃新鈔的販賣機\n\n: Vending machines that accept new bills
translations.可以從窗外看到日本天氣很好。👍👍👍\n\n: You can see the great weather in Japan from the window. 👍👍👍
translations.可以直接刷交通卡上下車(Suica) 或是去候車亭裡面投幣買票。\n\n: You can directly tap your transportation card (Suica) when boarding and getting off, or you can go inside the bus shelter to pay by coin and buy a ticket.
translations.可以直接從窗外回頭看姬路站鐵路，火車經過也會有輕微的軌道聲，但還好晚上之後就沒火: You can directly look back at Himeji Station railway from the window. Trains passing by make slight track noises, but fortunately, there are no trains after nightfall.
translations.可以看到來參拜等待進入出雲大社停車場的車輛綿延不絕。\n\n: You can see a continuous line of vehicles waiting to enter the parking lot for visiting Izumo Taisha.
translations.可以靜靜的坐在這邊享受庭院美景。\n\n: You can quietly sit here and enjoy the garden view.
translations.可愛的小爪水獺家族，一直嚶嚶叫。\n\n: The cute little clawed otter family kept chirping.
translations.可能因為太胖，現在不販賣食物在場內餵食、不能餵場外食物或放東西在他頭上。\n\n: Maybe because it’s too fat, feeding food inside the area is no longer allowed, and you cannot feed it food from outside or put anything on its head.
translations.可能因為小機場比較嚴格，如果跟我一樣獨旅的幾乎都被問會待幾天？會去哪些地方？有的:
It might be because smaller airports are stricter. Almost every solo traveler like me was asked how many days they would stay and which places they planned to visit. Some were even required to show hotel reservations.  
(So if you're traveling alone, prepare these in advance.)
translations.可能是假日的關係活動比較多，Kiddy Land 外也有卡娜赫拉的合影活動。(另: Maybe because it's a holiday, there are more events. Outside Kiddy Land, there is also a Kanahei photo event. (Another Usagi XD)
translations.可能是因為是海埔新生地港口區，這邊很荒涼走起來覺得很遠。\n\n: Perhaps because it is a reclaimed port area, this place feels very desolate and the walk seems quite long.
translations.可能是因為楓葉季還沒開始，所以沒什麼人，同船的只有四位，很空。\n\n: Maybe it's because the maple leaf season hasn't started yet, so there were few people. There were only four passengers on the boat, making it very spacious.
translations.右邊：在白兔神社買的(有詩籤)\n: Right side: Bought at Shirahama Shrine (includes a poem fortune slip)
translations.吃完大約 10:00 沒有特別想去的地點。\n\n: After eating, around 10:00, there was no particular place I wanted to visit.
translations.吃完後就再花 20 分鐘走路下山回到志納所入口。\n\n: After eating, spend another 20 minutes walking down the mountain back to the Shinosho entrance.
translations.吃完走到海岸線的舊居留地、大丸前站，搭一站後再步行前往神戶塔。\n\n: After eating, walk to the old foreign settlement along the coastline near Daimaru-mae Station, take one stop, then walk to Kobe Tower.
translations.吃飽亂晃一下大約 11:30，A1 登機門的壞處是離 [**一航免費貴賓室**]: After eating, I wandered around a bit until about 11:30. The downside of gate A1 is that it's far from the [**Terminal 1 Free Lounge**](../cb65fd5ab770/), so I skipped walking back and forth and went straight to the waiting area.
translations.吃飽再亂逛一下，雨後的姬路。\n\n: After eating, I wandered around a bit—Himeji after the rain.
translations.吃飽喝足洗完澡下樓洗個衣服，這次知道東橫要自備洗劑，先投幣買洗衣粉連同衣服投入洗: After eating and drinking, taking a shower, I went downstairs to do laundry. This time I knew Toyoko Inn requires bringing your own detergent, so I first bought washing powder with coins and put it in the washing machine along with my clothes. The dryer here is very new and high-end, and you can even select the temperature.
translations.吃飽往下走從二號入口往下逛沙丘美術館。(同樣用 [**周遊3日券**](http: After eating, head down from Entrance No. 2 to visit the Sand Dunes Museum. (Also free admission with the [**3-Day Pass**](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/20307-jr-sanin-okayama-area-pass?cid=19365){:target="_blank"} )
translations.吃飽後再大阪車站附近閒晃，想說去大阪的 Kiddy Land 找找吉伊卡哇。\n: After eating, I wandered around near Osaka Station and decided to visit Osaka's Kiddy Land to look for Gii Kawa.
translations.吉伊卡哇自已獨立一個櫃位在另外一邊。\n\n: Jiikawa has its own separate counter on the other side.
translations.同前述，因為太荒涼走起來感覺很遠，確實也很遠，從中埠頭走來 2 公里(約 30: As mentioned before, it feels very remote and indeed it is quite far—about 2 kilometers (around 30 minutes) walking from Nakakō Wharf.
translations.含來回 20KG 托運＋選位＋雜費價格： `NT$ 9,118`\n: Including round-trip 20KG checked baggage + seat selection + miscellaneous fees: `NT$ 9,118`
translations.商店街亂逛，找扭蛋行程。\n\n: Wandering around the shopping street, looking for a capsule toy machine.
translations.商店街巷子狹窄左右都有吃的，有幾家感覺是排隊名店、很多人。\n\n: The shopping street alley is narrow with food on both sides. A few shops seem to be popular spots with long queues and many people.
translations.喵了一下薩爾達周邊， [上次已經買很多了](../76d66c2e34af/): Checked out some Zelda merchandise, but [already bought a lot last time](../76d66c2e34af/), so I left without buying anything this time.
translations.回來到來的時候的反方向縣民會館前公車站等車回去。\n\n: Return by waiting for the bus at the Kenmin Hall bus stop in the opposite direction from when you arrived.
translations.回來才看到鳥取因為交通比較不方便，所以有提供計程車包車一日遊， [詳情請參考遊客: After returning, I noticed that because transportation in Tottori is less convenient, there is a taxi charter service for a one-day tour. [For details, please refer to the tourist center or this website](https://chugoku.letsgojp.com/archives/661034){:target="_blank"}.
translations.回安來站的路上有看到很紅的楓葉。\n\n: On the way back to Anlai Station, I saw very vibrant red maple leaves.
translations.回神戶站的路上先去中華街買 [Kobe Frantz 巧克力伴手禮](https: On the way back to Kobe Station, I first went to Chinatown to buy [Kobe Frantz chocolate souvenirs](https://frantz.co.jp/en/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.回： **17:30 OKJ** 岡山桃太郎機場 -&gt; 19:35 TPE: Return: **17:30 OKJ** Okayama Momotaro Airport -> 19:35 TPE Taipei Taoyuan International Airport
translations.因幡之白兔跟大國主神的故事。\n\n: The story of the White Rabbit of Inaba and the deity Okuninushi.
translations.因時間有限出雲其他神社就沒去參拜了，沒有自駕感覺也很難搜集。\n\n: Due to limited time, I didn't visit other shrines in Izumo. Without driving, it felt difficult to explore them all.
translations.因為到訪時間有限，無法待到夕陽，逛了一下就折返離開了。\n\n: Due to limited time, I couldn't stay until sunset and left after a brief visit.
translations.因為時間有限想繼續前往足立美術館，就沒有上去了。\n\n: Due to limited time, I decided to skip going up and continued on to Adachi Museum of Art.
translations.因為滿員提早 12:45 就發車了。\n\n: The departure was moved up to 12:45 due to full capacity.
translations.因為神戶馬拉松的緣故，出站的人很多。\n\n: Due to the Kobe Marathon, there were many people exiting the station.
translations.因班次與明日行程安排，所以預約早 07:05 的班次先前往松江的飯店寄放行李\n: Due to the schedule and tomorrow’s itinerary, I booked the early 07:05 train to Matsue to drop off my luggage at the hotel.
translations.國內線這邊有蠻多位子可以坐著休息。\n\n: There are quite a few seats available here in the domestic terminal to sit and rest.
translations.在 21 月台這邊排隊候車，不用擔心搭不上，只要是 13:00 前來排隊的都會送: Line up here at Platform 21 to wait for the bus. Don’t worry about missing it; as long as you queue before 13:00, you will be taken to the airport (additional shuttle buses will be added if it’s full).
translations.在 川跡車站 需要再換車 (跟著大家走到對面月台)，轉乘 一畑電車大社線 前往: At Kawato Station, you need to transfer trains (follow everyone to the opposite platform) to take the Ichibata Electric Railway Taisha Line heading to Izumo Taisha-mae Station.
translations.在商店街隨便找了一家有神戶牛的店當晚餐。\n\n: I randomly picked a restaurant with Kobe beef in the shopping street for dinner.
translations.在地下街又迷路了一下才找到大阪梅田地鐵站，搭阪急神戶線前往神戶三宮（阪急）。\n: I got a bit lost in the underground mall before finally finding Osaka Umeda subway station, then took the Hankyu Kobe Line to Kobe Sannomiya (Hankyu).
translations.在大阪地下街迷路，走了很久才找到阪急三番街，再走地下聯絡道從南館到北館，美食街上: Got lost in the Osaka underground mall and walked for a long time before finding Hankyu Sanbangai. Then I took the underground passage from the South Building to the North Building, and the food court was right upstairs.
translations.在姬路城外面商店街找了一家有賣神戶牛的店，外帶了神戶牛丼飯跟串燒回飯店休息充電。: Outside Himeji Castle, I found a shop selling Kobe beef in the shopping street and took away Kobe beef rice bowls and skewers to the hotel for rest and recharge.
translations.在岡山車站隨便買了一個炸牛排便當跟超商買些吃的喝的後就去飯店休息了；岡山車站正在: At Okayama Station, I casually bought a fried beef cutlet bento and some snacks and drinks from a convenience store, then went to the hotel to rest. Okayama Station is under renovation, and I will return here on the last day for the trip back.
translations.在日本的最後一晚，在飯店吃吃吃喝喝宵夜、啤酒。(這丸子是鬆軟口感…)\n\n: On the last night in Japan, eating and drinking late-night snacks and beer at the hotel. (These meatballs have a soft texture…)
translations.在機上隔壁坐一位 Youtuber 大哥「 [**跟著我們一起Chill wit: On the plane, the person sitting next to me was a YouTuber, [**Chill with us**](https://www.youtube.com/@lw.chill2022){:target="_blank"}, a very nice guy. He was going to Shikoku this time. We exchanged some sightseeing recommendations, and now I also want to visit Shikoku.
translations.在機場附近亂晃，機場外有一個縮小版的岡山後樂園還有很紅的楓葉。\n\n: Wandering around near the airport, there is a mini version of Okayama Korakuen outside the airport along with popular autumn maple leaves.
translations.在相生町下車，到對向公車站轉搭前往鳥取沙丘方向的公車。\n\n: Get off at Aioi-cho, then transfer at the opposite bus stop to the bus heading to Tottori Sand Dunes.
translations.在相簿中找到 eSIM 照片，長按 QRCode 就會出現「加入 eSIM」選項: Find the eSIM photo in the album, long press the QR code, and the "Add eSIM" option will appear.
translations.在紀念品店買了幅看到的館藏畫作 [横山大觀《神国日本》(Yokoyama Tai: Bought a cardboard replica of the artwork [Yokoyama Taikan “Mt.Fuji”](https://artsandculture.google.com/asset/mt-fuji/gQGjCiwQOJy4bg?hl=zh-TW){:target="_blank"} seen in the collection as a souvenir at the gift shop.
translations.在縣民會館前下車，一路往松江城走，停車場這邊就能看到「堀川遊覽船」乘船場。\n\: Get off in front of the Prefectural Civic Hall and walk towards Matsue Castle. You can see the "Horikawa Sightseeing Boat" dock near the parking lot.
translations.在觀光案內所亂逛消磨時間。\n\n: Wandering around the tourist information center to pass the time.
translations.在記念品店買了幾個中二貼紙。\n\n: Bought a few chūnibyō stickers at the souvenir shop.
translations.在車站的商店亂晃，這邊的伴手禮店也有賣沙丘布丁！\n\n: Wandering around the shops in the station, the souvenir store here also sells Dune pudding!
translations.夕陽接近地平線後時間用肉眼可見的速度在消逝，每一分每一秒太陽都在下降。\n\n: After the sunset approaches the horizon, time visibly slips away with the naked eye; every minute and every second, the sun keeps descending.
translations.外面可看到部分的庭院景觀，可以感覺得到花費了很大的時間人力在維護這個造景。\n\: You can see part of the courtyard view outside, which shows that a lot of time and effort have been spent maintaining this landscaping.
translations.外面有一條小商店街，因為時間還很早就先在這亂晃。\n\n: There is a small shopping street outside. Since it was still early, I wandered around here first.
translations.大廳可以拿免費的面膜、咖啡、茶包。\n\n: In the lobby, you can get free face masks, coffee, and tea bags.
translations.大神前的表參道很清幽漂亮，有時間的話這邊也有很多小店美食可以逛。\n\n: The approach to Ōkami Shrine is quiet and beautiful. If you have time, there are many small shops and delicious food to explore here.
translations.大約 10:00 就抵達機場，要等 10:20 才開櫃。\n\n: Arrived at the airport around 10:00, but the counter opens at 10:20.
translations.大約 10:30 回到松江站，回飯店拿行李。\n\n: Around 10:30, return to Matsue Station and pick up luggage at the hotel.
translations.大約 15:10 回到鳥取站，此時開始下雨。\n\n: Around 15:10, I returned to Tottori Station, and it started raining at that time.
translations.大約休息到 15:30 又重新出門。\n\n: Rested until about 15:30 and then went out again.
translations.大講堂旁的楓葉很紅。\n\n: The maple leaves beside the main hall are very red.
translations.大講堂有一個 [圓教寺 x 隈研吾](https://x.com/kugikum: The main hall features a [Engyoji x Kengo Kuma](https://x.com/kugikumo){:target="_blank"} installation art, on display until 12/1.
translations.天候不佳＋早上爬山＋手機沒電＝回飯店休息。\n\n: Bad weather + morning hiking + phone dead = back to the hotel to rest.
translations.如同前述，我一開始不知道要拿整理券，傻傻的就去等車，等到 13:00 發現不能上: As mentioned earlier, I didn't know I needed to get a numbered ticket at first, so I just waited for the bus. It wasn't until 1:00 PM that I realized I couldn't board and then went to get a numbered ticket for the 1:35 PM bus.
translations.如果你什麼都沒有可以點「手動輸入詳細資訊」複製貼上 eSIM 憑證資訊手動啟用：: If you have nothing else, you can click "Enter Details Manually" to copy and paste the eSIM voucher information for manual activation:
translations.如果想了解歷史再去出雲可參考蘭爸爸的影片：\n\n: If you want to learn about history before going to Izumo, you can refer to Lan Papa's video:
translations.姬路城前的三之丸廣場很大，從這邊還要再走 5 分鐘才會到城入口。\n\n: The San-no-maru Square in front of Himeji Castle is very large, and it takes another 5 minutes on foot from here to reach the castle entrance.
translations.姬路城距離車站約 1 公里，來回走了快 30 分鐘。\n\n: Himeji Castle is about 1 kilometer from the station, taking nearly 30 minutes to walk round trip.
translations.姬路站出站走 5 分鐘會到\n\n: It takes a 5-minute walk from Himeji Station exit.
translations.姬路站這邊意外的沒什麼好逛的，只有車站這邊的 Piole 跟 SANYO 山陽電: There isn't much to shop around Himeji Station. Only the Piole mall at the station and the department store in the SANYO Electric Railway building, plus a nearby shopping street. There's no Don Quijote or McDonald's, only one Lawson, and just one Matsumoto Kiyoshi drugstore.
translations.姬路車站有好幾個月台，Google Map 沒寫在哪個月台跟搭幾號公車，只能現場: Himeji Station has several platforms. Google Maps doesn't specify which platform or bus number to take, so you need to follow the signs on site. Take bus number 10 from platform 10, bound for Himeji Station North to Shoshazan Ropeway.
translations.安來這邊的清水寺感覺也是一個賞楓秘境。\n\n: The Kiyomizu Temple in Yasugi also feels like a hidden spot for autumn leaves viewing.
translations.宍道湖遊覽船，原價 1,800 日圓\n: Shinji Lake sightseeing boat, original price 1,800 yen
translations.官網可查詢 [可兌換 JR Pass 的車站](https://www.west:
You can check the official website for [stations where you can exchange the JR Pass](https://www.westjr.co.jp/global/tc/ticket/receive/?railpass=11&mco=1&area=0){:target="_blank"}. Not every station offers exchanges!  
(JR Okayama Station is available)
translations.室內還有兔兔貓貓狗狗互動區（要排整理券）、飲食、紀念品店…等等\n\n: Indoors, there is also an interaction area with rabbits, cats, and dogs (requires a numbered ticket), as well as dining and souvenir shops… and more.
translations.寄放完再回到松江站此時大約 10:00，重新劃位 10:48 從 松江 前往 出: After dropping off the luggage, return to Matsue Station around 10:00 and rebook the seat for Yakumo No. 3 departing from Matsue to Izumoshi at 10:48.
translations.實際用下來很好，很穩定、沒遇到被降速或斷線問題。\n\n: In actual use, it works very well, is stable, and I did not encounter any speed throttling or disconnection issues.
translations.對應信件內容填上 `SM-DP+ 位址` 、 `啟用碼` 、 `確認碼` (這次: Fill in the `SM-DP+ Address`, `Activation Code`, and `Confirmation Code` (none this time) as per the email, then click Next to complete activation.
translations.小廢物行李箱(大約跟 Airpods Pro 一樣大)跟娃包\n\n: Small useless suitcase (about the same size as AirPods Pro) and a kid's backpack
translations.展望台一二樓都是賣伴手禮跟有一個小餐廳，三樓可以上去眺望鳥取沙丘(雖然看不到什麼: The first and second floors of the observation deck sell souvenirs and have a small restaurant. On the third floor, you can go up to view the Tottori Sand Dunes (although there isn't much to see).
translations.岡山桃太郎機場是非常小的機場，同一時間只有一班國際航班(就是你這班而已)，跟著同:
Okayama Momotaro Airport is a very small airport, with only one international flight at a time (yours). You go through immigration and collect your luggage together with other passengers quickly.  
(This flight seemed nearly full, and it took about 30 minutes to get out.)
translations.岡山站找到自動售票處，排中間綠色的機器，只有這一台可以換 JR Pass\n: At Okayama Station, find the ticket vending machines and line up at the green machine in the middle. It's the only one that can exchange JR Pass.
translations.岡山進出，先去山陰島根縣出雲松江再去鳥取，最後回到姬路、關西、大阪；7 天 10: Starting and ending in Okayama, first visiting San'in Shimane Prefecture (Izumo and Matsue), then Tottori, and finally returning to Himeji, Kansai, and Osaka; 7 days, 100,000 steps, covering over 1,000 kilometers by transport, exploring the San'in and Kansai regions in one trip.
translations.左邊：在出雲大社外的禮品店買的\n: Left: Bought at a souvenir shop outside Izumo Taisha Shrine
translations.巨嘴鳥跟梟，還有腳邊會出現的雉雞。(走路要小心不要踩到⚠️)\n\n: Toucan and owl, along with pheasants that appear near your feet. (Be careful not to step on them ⚠️)
translations.已經沒靠窗位只能坐走道 QQ\n: No window seats left, can only take the aisle seat QQ
translations.店內舒適沒什麼人。\n\n: The store is comfortable and not crowded.
translations.往上走到出雲大社入口，來的時間點 `2024/11/13` 正好是 **神在祭*: Walk uphill to the entrance of Izumo Taisha. The visit on `2024/11/13` happened to be during the **Kamiari Festival** ( `2024 Reiwa 6 Nov 11~Nov 17` ), so there were many Japanese visitors coming to pray.
translations.往上走會到島根縣立美術館，那邊比較熱鬧也有咖啡店；但是階梯平台這邊景色角度比較好: Going up leads to the Shimane Art Museum, which is livelier and has cafes; however, the viewpoint on the stair platform offers a better angle for the scenery.
translations.很快地 17:01 就已經看不到太陽了。\n\n: Quickly, by 17:01, the sun was already gone.
translations.很清幽安靜，但今年的楓葉較晚只有零星幾株轉紅。\n\n: It is very quiet and peaceful, but this year the maple leaves turned red later, with only a few scattered trees showing color.
translations.從乃木站走有點失策，這邊很荒涼沒什麼人…\n\n: Walking from Nogi Station was a bit of a mistake; this area is quite deserted with few people around...
translations.從二樓空橋一路走到隔壁的 TERASSO 找到一家還沒關門的燒肉店外帶燒肉便當回: Walked from the second-floor skybridge to the adjacent TERASSO and found a yakiniku restaurant that was still open. Took out a yakiniku bento to eat back at the hotel.
translations.從二號入口開始參觀是從外面的沙雕開始參觀再一路從 3 樓 2 樓往下走，實際館內: Starting from Entrance No. 2, the tour begins with the sand sculptures outside, then goes down from the 3rd floor to the 2nd floor. Actually, the sand sculptures are only on the 2nd floor inside the building. The venue is small, and if it weren't free, I probably wouldn't have entered.
translations.從二階往回看姬路站，一共有六階越往上越小、樓梯越陡峭，要排隊上樓。\n\n: Looking back at Himeji Station from the second floor, there are six floors in total. The higher you go, the smaller and steeper the stairs become, requiring you to queue to go up.
translations.從地下街過馬路到 AEON MALL B2，這邊也有一家麥當勞。\n\n: Cross the road from the underground mall to AEON MALL B2, where there is also a McDonald's.
translations.從桃太郎商店街這邊走五分鐘就到飯店。\n\n: It takes five minutes to walk from Momotaro Shopping Street to the hotel.
translations.從殿後小路往前走前往大講堂。\n\n: Walk forward from the rear corridor towards the Main Lecture Hall.
translations.從食堂二樓看大講堂。\n\n: View of the main auditorium from the second floor of the cafeteria.
translations.想投幾罐桃子水帶回台灣，全賣完了；只好投一罐紅茶花伝，回來後發現很好喝、不會太甜: I wanted to buy a few cans of peach water to bring back to Taiwan, but they were all sold out. So I got a can of Red Tea Flower instead. After trying it, I found it very tasty and not too sweet. I regret not buying more.
translations.想說先去找昨天路人推薦的姬路城拍攝點，拍攝點在跟入城口相反的方向，在右邊的「姬路: I decided to first visit the Himeji Castle photo spot recommended by a passerby yesterday. The spot is opposite the castle entrance, inside the "Himeji City Zoo" on the right side.
translations.想說山陰這邊比較特別就在這買伴手禮吧。\n\n: I thought since San'in is quite unique, I'll buy souvenirs here.
translations.意外的事是機場工作人員都會講中文\n: Unexpectedly, the airport staff all speak Chinese.
translations.我只參拜了摩尼殿跟大講堂就折返下山了。\n\n: I only visited the Mani Hall and the Great Lecture Hall before heading back down the mountain.
translations.我有把 eSIM QRCode 印出來，所以我是從這邊直接掃描啟用的。\n\n: I printed out the eSIM QR code, so I activated it by scanning directly from there.
translations.我的行程預計是搭乘 14:46 從安來出發前往鳥取的 JR，請注意 **往鳥取的: My itinerary plans to take the JR departing from Yasugi to Tottori at 14:46. Please note **there are not many trains heading to Tottori⚠️.**
translations.我點「神戶牛赤身肉牛排 220g」7,700 日圓 (未稅價⚠️，結帳要含稅)加: I ordered the "Kobe Beef Lean Steak 220g" for 7,700 yen (pre-tax ⚠️, tax included at checkout) with a set meal (salad, rice, soup) and draft beer.
translations.我點的是「鳥取和牛ひつまぶし」鳥取和牛三吃飯 3,500 日圓，價格上比神戶牛便: I ordered the "Tottori Wagyu Hitsumabushi," a three-way Tottori Wagyu beef rice dish for 3,500 yen, which is much cheaper than Kobe beef.
translations.或先去鳥取車站買觀光一日交通券比較划算。\n\n: Or buy a one-day sightseeing pass at Tottori Station for better value.
translations.所有建築都是古蹟(建於1282 年)，走在上面有一種穿越歷史的感覺，整體建築保存: All the buildings are historical monuments (built in 1282). Walking on them gives a feeling of traveling through history. The entire architecture is well preserved and maintained.
translations.打開 App 選擇「輸入」貼上序號按下「有效化」\n: Open the app, select "Input," paste the code, and press "Activate."
translations.打開手機相機，點左下角進入相簿\n: Open the phone camera, tap the bottom left corner to enter the photo album
translations.找了一間在大街上評價也不錯的鳥取和牛餐廳 — 「 [肉料理 Nick](http: Found a Tottori Wagyu restaurant with good reviews on the main street — "[Niku Ryori Nick](https://maps.app.goo.gl/pSZF8bCsiRNJ4aSt6){:target="_blank"}" to try Tottori Wagyu. Not sure if it was a weekday, but I was the only customer.
translations.抵達松江站後一路小跑步，要趕 11:25 一畑電車北松江線 先前往 川跡車站。\: After arriving at Matsue Station, I ran all the way to catch the 11:25 Ichibata Electric Railway Kitamatsue Line heading to Kawato Station.
translations.拍完姬路城走回左側城入口參觀城內。\n\n: After taking photos of Himeji Castle, walk back to the left entrance to visit inside the castle.
translations.拿完整理券又再入場(可再入場)坐在一開始的室內觀景區域放空看景等車。\n\n: Get the full ticket and re-enter (re-entry allowed), then sit in the initial indoor viewing area to relax and watch the scenery while waiting for the bus.
translations.按照步驟掃描 JR Pass QR Code 和護照即可完成兌換。\n\n: Follow the steps to scan the JR Pass QR Code and your passport to complete the exchange.
translations.排隊的人蠻多的，粗估至少要等 40 分鐘以上。\n\n: There were quite a few people in line, estimated to wait at least 40 minutes.
translations.接近傍晚時分開始下大雨，還好今天本來就無特別行程安排。\n\n: It started raining heavily near dusk, but fortunately, there were no special plans for today.
translations.換了日幣新鈔。\n\n: Exchanged for new Japanese yen bills.
translations.搭乘往 新長田，在下一站 港元町 下車。\n\n: Take the train towards Shin-Nagata and get off at the next stop, Minato Motomachi.
translations.搭乘新幹線到新大阪(25 分鐘)再轉乘御堂筋線到大阪的時間跟搭一般的直接到大阪差: Taking the Shinkansen to Shin-Osaka (25 minutes) and then transferring to the Midosuji Line to Osaka takes about the same time as taking a regular train directly to Osaka. Since there are many Shinkansen departures, I chose the more comfortable Shinkansen where I could also charge my devices.
translations.搭乘新幹線大約 21 分鐘就會到岡山車站了，可惜這次時間不夠無法 [再訪廣島](: It takes about 21 minutes by Shinkansen to reach Okayama Station. Unfortunately, I didn’t have enough time this trip to [visit Hiroshima again](https://medium.com/ztravel/%E9%81%8A%E8%A8%98-2023-%E5%BB%A3%E5%B3%B6%E5%B2%A1%E5%B1%B1-6-%E6%97%A5%E9%81%8A-31b9b3a63abc?source=collection_home---4------2-----------------------){:target="_blank"}.
translations.搭到的這班要在沙丘東口下車走上去。\n\n: Take this bus and get off at the Dune East Entrance to walk up.
translations.搭到這邊苗頭不對直接跳車，Google Map 建議我走回市民廣場站轉搭下一班。: The vibe felt off here, so I got off the bus immediately. Google Maps suggested I walk back to Civic Square Station to catch the next one.
translations.搭到難波站出來再走一小段在某個巷子內就是神社。\n\n: After getting off at Namba Station, walk a short distance into an alley where you'll find the shrine.
translations.摩尼殿可以脫鞋走進去參拜，也可以從這邊鳥瞰楓葉。\n\n: You can take off your shoes and enter the Mani Hall to pray, and also enjoy a bird's-eye view of the maple leaves from here.
translations.摸前、摸完都要記得洗個手。\n\n: Remember to wash your hands before and after touching.
translations.整體來說體驗蠻好的！\n\n: Overall, the experience was quite good!
translations.施工中的岡山站跟暫時被移到車站旁的桃太郎。\n\n: Okayama Station under construction and Momotaro temporarily moved beside the station.
translations.旁邊的食堂也能進去參觀，有很多歷史文物陳列。\n\n: The adjacent cafeteria is also open for visits, displaying many historical artifacts.
translations.日本視角、轉播內容完全聽不懂，但日本的轉播資訊很完整，左邊還有棒球知識補充，右邊: The Japanese broadcast is completely unintelligible to me, but their coverage is very thorough. On the left, there are baseball knowledge supplements, and on the right, a detailed analysis of the pitch types.
translations.日落之後轉身等公車準備回松江了。\n\n: After sunset, I turned around and waited for the bus to head back to Matsue.
translations.早上 8:45 出飯店穿過空無一人的商店街前往車站。\n\n: At 8:45 AM, left the hotel and walked through the deserted shopping street to the station.
translations.早上先去白兔神社(姻緣)參拜，回到鳥取站北口往公車總站走，穿過公車大廳到後面 4: In the morning, first visit Hakuto Shrine (for matchmaking) to pray. Return to the north exit of Tottori Station and head to the bus terminal. Walk through the bus hall to the back and wait at platform 4 for the bus.
translations.時間還很早，我們要搭 16:55 的特急超級白兔前往姬路。\n\n: It's still early, and we will take the 16:55 Limited Express Super Hakuto to Himeji.
translations.時間還很早，打算先去「 [神戶動物王國](https://maps.app.go: It's still early, so I plan to visit [Kobe Animal Kingdom](https://maps.app.goo.gl/fspZDr7MyGMpT24r6){:target="_blank"} to see the capybaras first.
translations.時間還很早，沒什麼人；老闆聽到我是台灣來的很熱情，這餐也是來神戶的目的， **吃: It was still early, and there weren't many people; the owner was very enthusiastic when he heard I was from Taiwan. This meal was also a main reason for coming to Kobe—**to have a good meal of Kobe beef**—since I had been eating randomly for the past few days.
translations.時間還非常早，今年搭的是 17:30 起飛的航班、去年是搭 15:25 的這個時: The time is still very early. This year, I took the 17:30 flight, while last year I took the 15:25 flight, which was just right. For the 17:30 flight, arriving now means waiting almost 4 hours.
translations.書寫山圓教寺幅員遼闊，全部走完我覺得至少要 2 小時起跳。\n\n: Mount Shosha Engyo-ji Temple covers a vast area, and I think it takes at least 2 hours to explore it all.
translations.書寫山這邊 11/15–17 有夜間特別開放活動，開到晚上 20:00，纜車時間: At Mount Shosha, from 11/15 to 11/17, there is a special night opening event until 8:00 PM, and the cable car service is extended until 8:30 PM.
translations.最一開始 2024 下半年是想去仙台的，不過查了一下景點資料，這個時間點去，我的: At first, I planned to visit Sendai in the second half of 2024. However, after checking the attractions, I wasn’t very interested in going at this time. I recalled that during the same week last year (11/13–18), I took a **"[Sanyo Region Hiroshima Okayama 6-Day Free Trip](../31b9b3a63abc/)"** and had a great impression of the Chugoku region, Sanyo, and Okayama — beautiful scenery, convenient transportation, and fewer tourists. So, I decided to explore the Sanin region (Shimane, Tottori) this time. Luckily, I had some free time from work and needed a break from recent stress, which led to this 7-day, 6-night solo trip covering Sanin and Kansai areas (Himeji, Osaka).
translations.最後也在這邊等公車回鳥取。\n\n: Finally, waited here for the bus back to Tottori.
translations.最後再環顧一下 [觀夕日階梯平台](https://maps.app.goo.g: Finally, take another look around the [Sunset Viewing Staircase Platform](https://maps.app.goo.gl/LRQAMZNht9km1DFm6){:target="_blank"} and the people watching the sunset together.
translations.最後在一樓無印良品買了些東西大約 12:15 就離開了。\n\n: Finally, I bought some items at Muji on the first floor and left around 12:15.
translations.最後快到回程的地方會有一個松江城拍攝點，可以從這邊拍松江城遠景。\n\n: Near the end, close to the return point, there is a photo spot for Matsue Castle where you can capture a distant view of the castle.
translations.最後發現車站北口二樓這個看台拍姬路城就是最佳位子。\n\n: I found that the viewing platform on the second floor of the station's north exit is the best spot to photograph Himeji Castle.
translations.最後看一眼姬路的早晨。\n\n: A final glance at the morning in Himeji.
translations.最後這場是日本勝。\n\n: The final match was a win for Japan.
translations.最後離開鳥取沙丘再回頭看一眼，真的很巨大；鞋子裡不免也積了一些沙子， **看有人: Looking back at Tottori Sand Dunes as I left, it really is huge; some sand inevitably got into my shoes. **I saw someone smartly put on plastic shoe covers.**
translations.會有四個過橋點需要下降船身，要小心手頭不要夾到\n: There are four bridge points where the boat deck needs to be lowered, so be careful not to pinch your hands.
translations.有一家信長書店，可以買御守送朋友，嘻嘻。\n\n: There is a Nobunaga Bookstore where you can buy omamori (amulets) as gifts for friends, hehe.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有四座橋過橋時會下降船身，要稍微彎腰趴著通過。\n\n: There are four bridges where the boat lowers its height, so you need to bend down slightly to pass through.
translations.朝這支旗杆的方向走就會來到「神樂殿」這裡有日本第一大 [注連繩](https:/: Walk towards this flagpole to reach the "Kaguraden," where you can find Japan's largest [Shimenawa](https://sanin-japan.com/zh-tw/special/territory-of-the-gods-yokozuna-and-izumo-taisha/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本來想去鳥取當地有名的 すなば珈琲（砂場咖啡），但下午三點多他們已經休息，就在車: I originally wanted to visit Tottori’s famous すなば珈琲 (Sunaba Coffee), but they were already closed after 3 PM. So I found a nana’s green tea inside the station to have some dessert and coffee to recharge (both myself and my phone).
translations.本來想衝 鳴門旋渦、明石海峽大橋 但是天候依然不佳，所以改去大阪神戶逛街。\n\: Originally planned to visit Naruto Whirlpools and Akashi Kaikyō Bridge, but due to bad weather, switched to shopping in Osaka and Kobe.
translations.本來沒什麼感覺，但接近夕日的時候開始體會到第一夕陽的魅力，剛剛的鷺也很配合地融入: At first, I didn't feel much, but as the sunset approached, I began to appreciate the charm of the first sunset. The heron earlier also blended perfectly with the scenery.
translations.本棟這邊沒有電梯，訂到的是 2 號館，可以從本棟大廳穿過天橋到 2 號館，2 號: There is no elevator in this building. The booking is for Building 2, which can be reached by crossing the skybridge from the main building lobby. On the 2nd floor of Building 2, there is a lounge with a microwave, laundry room, and vending machines.
translations.朱利安國王跟會吃同事的鵜鶘、也有夜行館貓頭鷹\n\n: King Julian and pelicans that eat colleagues, also night-dwelling owls
translations.松江城游船，原價 1600 日圓\n: Matsue Castle boat tour, original price 1600 yen
translations.松江天氣超級好☀️，抵達松江站後直接前往今晚入住的飯店「 [**Matsue U: The weather in Matsue was perfect ☀️. After arriving at Matsue Station, I went straight to tonight's hotel, [**Matsue Urban Hotel**](https://www.station.matsue-urban.co.jp/en/){:target="_blank"}, to drop off my luggage.
translations.松江站出站走 2 分鐘就會到\n\n: It takes only 2 minutes to walk from Matsue Station exit.
translations.查網路資料好像可以騎駱駝但今天看起來是因為天氣不好所以沒有。\n\n: According to online information, camel riding is usually available, but it seems it was canceled today due to bad weather.
translations.桃太郎機場太小，跟其他機場報到＋托運的流程不一樣。\n\n: Momotaro Airport is very small, and the check-in and baggage drop-off process is different from other airports.
translations.樓上這邊吃的選擇很多。\n\n: There are many dining options upstairs.
translations.機上無 WiFi 只能聽聽音樂玩玩單機遊戲。\n\n: No WiFi on the plane, so just listen to music and play offline games.
translations.機場很小，順著路走出來就是往岡山車站的巴士，而且會有工作人員引導、不怕迷路直接上: The airport is small, and just follow the path to find the bus to Okayama Station. Staff members will guide you, so don’t worry about getting lost—just hop on the bus.
translations.機場整修中..但依然有扭蛋。\n\n: The airport is under renovation... but there are still capsule toys.
translations.此時台灣開始下大雨，但是沒什麼風對起飛影響不大。\n\n: At this time, heavy rain started in Taiwan, but there was little wind, so it did not significantly affect the takeoff.
translations.每家東橫 INN 都有提供免費早餐，但我都為了趕行程早上幾乎都自己隨便吃個前一晚: Every Toyoko INN offers free breakfast, but since I was rushing my schedule, I usually just grabbed some convenience store bread and coffee I bought the night before and headed out.
translations.每隻都一臉慵懶，不用上班真好！\n\n: Each one looks so lazy, it must be great not having to work!
translations.比較特別的是牛骨湯拉麵，一般是豚骨，買了一盒回台灣品嚐。\n\n: What’s special is the beef bone broth ramen, usually it’s pork bone. I bought a box to try back in Taiwan.
translations.比較訝異的是豬排上來的時候沒有全熟，大約 7 分熟；查了一下評價跟介紹好像就是這: Surprisingly, the pork cutlet was served medium rare, about 70% cooked. After checking reviews and descriptions, it seems this is their specialty. However, I still used the hot iron plate to cook the meat pieces that could be cooked further.
translations.水獺這邊有一隻馬來貘，但是沒什麼理他 QQ\n\n: There is a Malayan tapir here at the otter enclosure, but it’s mostly ignored QQ
translations.沒事先處理一下兩個網路問題，第一個是我的 [**中華電信漫遊功能是關閉的**](: Without resolving two network issues first, the first is that my [**Chunghwa Telecom roaming function is turned off**](https://123.cht.com.tw/IVRredir/){:target="_blank"}, so I can't directly buy a roaming plan if needed; therefore, I called Chunghwa Telecom to unlock the roaming function just in case.
translations.沒去過山陰地區跟姬路，以這三個地方為主。\n\n: I have never been to the San'in region or Himeji, so I focused on these three places.
translations.沒特別便宜，但還可以接受，如果選同去年的去回時間會更貴，大概要 `NT$ 12,: Not particularly cheap, but still acceptable. If you choose the same round-trip dates as last year, it would be even more expensive, around `NT$ 12,000`.
translations.準備去吃 Shake Shack，七月去曼谷吃過， [意猶未盡](https:/: Getting ready to eat at Shake Shack. I tried it in Bangkok last July and still crave it [link](https://medium.com/ztravel/%E9%81%8A%E8%A8%98-2024-%E6%B3%B0%E5%9C%8B%E6%9B%BC%E8%B0%B7-bangkok-5-%E6%97%A5%E8%87%AA%E7%94%B1%E8%A1%8C-b7e7c0938985?source=collection_home---4------0-----------------------){:target="_blank"}. Now enjoying it again in Osaka.
translations.準備搭乘 13:00 的交通車去岡山機場。\n\n: Preparing to take the 13:00 shuttle to Okayama Airport.
translations.無意間找到的 Youtube 頻道，可以看到宍道湖天氣景色。\n\n: A YouTube channel I found by chance where you can see the weather and scenery of Lake Shinji.
translations.牛舌便當好吃，超商買的水蜜桃氣泡酒也好喝。\n\n: The beef tongue bento was delicious, and the peach sparkling wine bought at the convenience store was also tasty.
translations.特色是會給你一小包像沙子的砂糖，加下去一起吃。\n\n: A special feature is that they give you a small packet of sugar that looks like sand to add and eat together.
translations.環繞走了一圈，人蠻多的，有的需要排很長的隊伍參拜。\n\n: I walked around the area; there were quite a few people, and some spots required waiting in long lines to pray.
translations.生菜清爽，湯是牛肉湯，很好喝。\n\n: The lettuce is fresh and crisp, and the soup is beef broth, very tasty.
translations.白兔海灘很荒涼。\n\n: White Rabbit Beach is very desolate.
translations.直接用自助點餐，這次吃酪梨培根雞肉堡跟奶昔；這家空間蠻大的、位子也多。\n\n: I ordered through the self-service kiosk this time, choosing the avocado bacon chicken burger and a milkshake. This place has a spacious interior with plenty of seats.
translations.看不懂日文差點選錯，要選這個「マックグリドル」才是鬆餅系列。\n\n: If you can't read Japanese, you might almost choose the wrong item. You need to select "マックグリドル" for the pancake series.
translations.看宣傳進入右手邊有卡皮巴拉，但可能因為太冷沒出來；進去後直接直走過橋看到摩天輪後: According to the promotion, there is a capybara on the right side, but it might not have come out due to the cold. After entering, go straight across the bridge, turn right after seeing the Ferris wheel, and there is an open space behind it which is the photo spot.
translations.真的很划算，光上面這些加總就可以省 8,390 日圓，已經是整個 JR Pass: It's really a great deal. Just adding up the above savings amounts to 8,390 yen, which is already half the price of the entire JR Pass.
translations.真的很巧，當初在安排時間的時候其實沒有刻意選這個時間點，是在查景點資訊的時候才知: What a coincidence! When I was planning the schedule, I didn't intentionally choose this time. I only found out while checking the attraction information.
translations.神戶動物王國雖然是半室內半室外，但裡面的動線規劃蠻好的，各種飛禽走獸都有，而且多: Kobe Animal Kingdom is partly indoor and partly outdoor, but the layout is well planned. There are various birds and animals, most of which you can get close to. It's great for families to spend half a day here. The animals are in much better condition compared to Himeji City Zoo, and the environment is very clean.
translations.神戶港這邊蠻有港灣小鎮的感覺，有機會的話會考慮在神戶這邊住一晚。\n\n: Kobe Port has a nice harbor town vibe. If I get the chance, I would consider staying overnight in Kobe.
translations.神戶的 Kiddy Land 沒什麼人但是吉伊卡哇的商品很少，沒找到我要的睡衣烏: Kiddly Land in Kobe was not crowded, but there were very few Gikawa products. I couldn't find the Usagi pajamas I wanted.
translations.神戶這邊好熱鬧(相較姬路)，有好多百貨可以逛。\n\n: Kobe is very lively (compared to Himeji), with many department stores to explore.
translations.神戶馬拉松有封路跑上高架，這條地鐵跟北捷文湖線一樣是早期的輪胎捷運。\n\n: The Kobe Marathon features road closures with runners going onto the elevated highway. This subway line, like Taipei Metro's Wenhu Line, is an early model of a rubber-tired metro.
translations.神社不大，觀光客很多，到此一遊拍幾張照片就離開了。\n\n: The shrine is small and crowded with tourists. I took a few photos and left shortly after.
translations.神社整體不大，大約 15–20 分鐘就可以參拜完。\n\n: The shrine is not very large; it takes about 15–20 minutes to visit.
translations.穿過仁王門大概還有 400 公尺。\n\n: About 400 meters left after passing through the Niomon Gate.
translations.穿過入口鳥居後還要再走大約 5 分鐘才會到神社。\n\n: After passing through the entrance torii gate, it takes about another 5 minutes to reach the shrine.
translations.穿過鄉間小巷大約 20 分鐘抵達足立美術館。\n\n: Walk through the rural alleys for about 20 minutes to reach the Adachi Museum of Art.
translations.第一件事是在入口前櫃檯依照自己行程安排領取對應時間的「接駁車整理券」，一人一張；: The first step is to get a "shuttle bus ticket" matching your schedule at the front desk near the entrance, one ticket per person. When the time comes, return to the drop-off spot and use the ticket to take the shuttle back to Yasurai Station.
translations.第二、三吃加上它附的湯變茶泡飯就很好吃。\n\n: The second and third bites, combined with the soup it comes with, make for a delicious chazuke (tea poured over rice).
translations.第二個網路問題是先在機場啟用 eSIM，因 eSIM 輸入啟用需要連接網路，怕岡: The second internet issue was activating the eSIM at the airport. Since activating the eSIM requires an internet connection, and the WiFi at Okayama Airport might be unstable, I activated the Japan eSIM in Taiwan where the network was stable beforehand.
translations.第二步直接插入一張「JR Pass 車票」\n(同行多人要一起劃位會在第四步請你:
Step 2: Directly insert a "JR Pass ticket"  
(If traveling with others who need seat reservations together, you will be asked to continue inserting them in Step 4.)
translations.等車期間有看到柯南列車。\n\n: I saw the Conan train while waiting for the bus.
translations.約 10:30 抵達通天閣下，準備上去的人大排長龍，我直接放棄。\n\n: Around 10:30, I arrived at the base of Tsutenkaku. There was a long line of people waiting to go up, so I gave up immediately.
translations.約出發前 1~3 天會收到虎航寄發的行程通知信， **務必！務必！務必！** 在: You will receive a trip notification email from Tigerair 1 to 3 days before departure. **Be sure! Be sure! Be sure!** to complete the online "self check-in" before departure:
translations.約莫快 18:00 一路走到鳥取北口商店街附近覓食，前幾天都亂吃，今天想找一間餐: Around 18:00, I walked to the area near Tottori North Exit Shopping Street to find a place to eat. After eating randomly the past few days, I wanted to find a better restaurant today.
translations.總路程約需 2 小時 45 分鐘，可以感受到一路穿山越嶺，一大清早的很多地區都還: The total journey takes about 2 hours and 45 minutes. You can feel the route winding through mountains and ridges. Early in the morning, many areas are still covered in mist, giving a sense of passing through tunnels into a hidden paradise. Unfortunately, I didn't get a window seat, so I could only enjoy the view from afar.
translations.繼續找扭蛋，但都沒找到我要的電車按鈕扭蛋，放棄…應該是沒再出了。\n\n: Kept looking for the gacha, but couldn't find the train button gacha I wanted, so I gave up... It’s probably no longer available.
translations.肉很嫩、汁多、肉味足，相較昨天吃的神戶牛，這才是神戶牛的滋味。\n\n: The meat is tender, juicy, and full of flavor. Compared to the Kobe beef I had yesterday, this is the true taste of Kobe beef.
translations.蕨餅＋冰淇淋＋熱咖啡，很滿足。\n\n: Warabi mochi + ice cream + hot coffee, very satisfying.
translations.虎航 [**預辦登機服務(在機捷就報到+掛行李，到機場直接出境)**](http: Tigerair's [**Online Check-in Service (Check-in and drop luggage at the Airport MRT, then go straight to departure at the airport)**](https://www.taoyuan-airport.com/ITCI/index.html){:target="_blank"} is only available at **Airport MRT A3 New Taipei Industrial Park Station**; not available at Taipei Main Station, so I took the direct Airport MRT train straight to Terminal 1.
translations.虎航的位子舒適度我覺得算廉航中優秀的了(相較樂桃太小、越捷椅子不好坐)，不過虎航: I find Tigerair's seat comfort to be excellent among budget airlines (compared to Peach's seats being too small and Vietjet's seats being uncomfortable). However, a downside of Tigerair is that [**bringing your own food is prohibited**](https://www.threads.net/@kechi.syonen/post/DCYnEQNzU5L/%E4%BB%80%E9%BA%BC%E8%83%BD%E5%B8%B6%E4%B8%8A%E9%A3%9B%E6%A9%9F%E4%BB%80%E9%BA%BC%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E5%B8%B6%E5%BE%88%E6%B8%85%E6%A5%9A%E4%BB%99%E5%8F%B0%E6%A9%9F%E5%A0%B4){:target="_blank"}, so it's best to board just after a meal!
translations.行動方案標籤可選擇「旅遊」\n: The action plan tag can be set to "Travel"
translations.行李安放好之後就去搭乘往足立美術館的接駁車(免費、排隊依序上車)，早上來的時候沒: After placing the luggage, I took the shuttle bus to Adachi Museum of Art (free, board in order while queuing). There were not many people in the morning.
translations.裡面吃的選擇也不太多，要先去旁邊自動販賣機投幣買對應的套餐票券，直接入場找位子坐: There aren't many food options inside. You need to first buy the corresponding meal ticket from the nearby vending machine, then enter, find a seat, and hand the ticket to the staff.
translations.裡面有兩家喫茶室，除了甜點咖啡也有賣熟食；不妨在此駐足休息吃個東西看看景色。\n: There are two cafes inside, offering not only desserts and coffee but also savory dishes. Feel free to stop by, rest, have a bite, and enjoy the view.
translations.複製憑證信中的序號\n: Copy the serial number from the certificate email
translations.要吃東西、買伴手禮 (B1-B2) 也都有。\n\n: There are also places to eat and buy souvenirs (B1-B2).
translations.觀光案內所裡真的有養一隻白色兔兔，也有賣一些吃的跟伴手禮，買了一個麵包果腹。\n: The tourist information center really has a white rabbit, and they also sell some snacks and souvenirs. I bought a bread to fill my stomach.
translations.請注意是 JR 元町站不要跑去阪神電車元町站。\n\n: Please make sure to go to JR Motomachi Station, not the Hanshin Electric Railway Motomachi Station.
translations.請注意是 JR 站英文名， *所以 [要去福岡要打 Hakata](../d78: Please note the JR station English names, *so [to go to Fukuoka, type Hakata](../d78e0b15a08a/)* XD
translations.買了一個嚐一嚐，味道真的不錯，布丁牛奶味濃郁口感像奶酪。\n\n: Bought one to try, the taste is really good. The pudding has a rich milk flavor and a texture similar to cheesecake.
translations.買了一個超迷你 Cup Noodle\n\n: Bought a super mini Cup Noodle
translations.買了兩大盒餅乾(適合分同事)回來分同事，甜的普通但是是出雲大社參拜紀念，鹹的海鮮: Bought two large boxes of cookies (good for sharing with colleagues) to distribute. The sweet ones are ordinary but serve as a souvenir from visiting Izumo Taisha. The savory seafood pancake cookies, I think, are very tasty!
translations.買了神在祭期間限定的御守。 **(僅此一周販售)**\n\n: Bought a limited edition amulet for the Kamiari Festival. **(Sold only during this week)**
translations.買完票順著參觀路線一路進到城內。\n\n: After buying the ticket, follow the tour route straight into the castle.
translations.買晚餐前先在姬路站的百貨公司 [Piole Himeji](https://ww: Before buying dinner, I took a short walk and played with capsule toys at the department store [Piole Himeji](https://www.jrw-urban.co.jp/piole-himeji/tw){:target="_blank"} near Himeji Station.
translations.走到南公園站再一站就到了，就懶得搭捷運直接走去神戶動物王國…\n\n: From Minami Koen Station, it's just one more stop, but I was too lazy to take the subway and walked straight to Kobe Animal Kingdom…
translations.走到最高點可以鳥瞰整個海岸線，背沙丘面海的場景只有這裡有。\n\n: From the highest point, you can overlook the entire coastline. The view of the sand dunes facing the sea is unique to this spot.
translations.走到神社的距離不遠但路上有很多兔兔神像，都堆滿了姻緣石。\n\n: The shrine is not far away, but along the way, there are many rabbit statues, all covered with love stones.
translations.走回出雲大社公車站準備搭乘公車回到 JR 出雲站。\n\n: Walk back to the Izumo Taisha bus stop to catch the bus back to JR Izumo Station.
translations.走回地鐵站回大阪。\n\n: Walk back to the subway station to return to Osaka.
translations.走快到市民廣場前站想說怎麼那麼熱鬧，原來是神戶馬拉松的終點活動會場。\n\n: Walking quickly to the front of Civic Square, I wondered why it was so lively. It turned out to be the finish line event area for the Kobe Marathon.
translations.走進姬路城，門口這個橋景很好拍照！\n\n: Entering Himeji Castle, the bridge at the entrance is a great spot for photos!
translations.足立美術館，原價 2300 日圓\n: Adachi Museum of Art, original price 2300 yen
translations.跟上次一樣直接到岡山車站西口搭乘往機場巴士的地方，這裡就有置物櫃寄放行李、也有廁: Just like last time, go directly to the west exit of Okayama Station to catch the airport bus. There are lockers here to store luggage and restrooms available (at this time, the department stores are still closed, so restrooms are limited).
translations.路過阪神虎周邊商店。\n\n: Passing by the Hanshin Tigers merchandise store.
translations.車上遇到一位中國福建來的觀光客；他的行程剛好跟我相反，他先去姬路再去島根；於是互: On the train, I met a tourist from Fujian, China; his itinerary was the opposite of mine. He went to Himeji first and then to Shimane. We exchanged recommendations—he suggested visiting Shosha-san Engyo-ji Temple before Himeji Castle, and said the photo spot shown in the picture is great for taking pictures of the castle.
translations.車內蠻舒適的，前後有行李區可以直接放行李，座位也有充電座。\n\n: The interior is quite comfortable, with luggage areas at the front and back for easy storage. The seats also have charging ports.
translations.車型很古老也只有兩節列車(一節自由座、一節指定席)，我的 26 寸行李箱放不上上: The train model is very old and has only two cars (one non-reserved seat car and one reserved seat car). My 26-inch suitcase couldn't fit in the overhead luggage rack (newer JR trains can, but this model's rack is too small). I forgot that I could walk to the last row and place it behind the last seat, so I had to squeeze it into my own seat area.
translations.車站外也有一尊桃太郎，另外機場溫馨提醒要買保險， **我這次就真的就差點被自行車: There is also a Momotaro statue outside the station. Additionally, the airport kindly reminds travelers to buy insurance—**I almost got hit by a bicycle this time.⚠️**
translations.車站很多人，後來才知道今天剛好是 [神戶馬拉松](https://zh-tw.k: The station was very crowded, and I later found out that today happened to be the [Kobe Marathon](https://zh-tw.kobe-marathon.net/2024/global/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.輸入完成後需要花一點時間啟用，可能會卡在「啟用中…」一陣子或是跳出啟用失敗稍後再: After inputting, it takes some time to activate. It may get stuck at "Activating..." for a while or show an activation failed message asking you to try again later; just wait a bit longer. Once activated successfully, "Settings" -> "Cellular" will show "On," and the signal bars will appear at the top right, displaying signal status.
translations.近看真的超大，尤其跟其他殿的一般注連繩比較，大概是其他的 10 倍大。(長度為: Up close, it's really huge, especially compared to the regular shimenawa ropes at other shrines—about 10 times bigger. (Length is 14 meters, weight is 5 tons, replaced every few years, and handmade)
translations.迷路 Day…因為車剛好來沒仔細看上錯車，上到往北埠頭的車，悲劇從此刻開始。\n: Lost Day… Because the bus arrived just then and I didn’t check carefully, I got on the wrong bus heading to the North Pier. The tragedy started from that moment.
translations.途經松江神社，來到松江城。\n\n: Passing by Matsue Shrine, we arrived at Matsue Castle.
translations.途經超商同樣買了些吃的喝的。\n\n: Stopped by a convenience store and bought some food and drinks.
translations.這個拍攝點的取景很好，可惜沒有櫻花或楓葉陪襯。\n\n: This shooting spot has a great view, but unfortunately, there are no cherry blossoms or maple leaves to complement it.
translations.這列車車型也是要按旁邊開門按鈕才會開門的、車廂彼此是分開的。\n\n: This train model also requires pressing the door button next to it to open the door, and the carriages are separated from each other.
translations.這家的特色是有一個前菜招財貓甜點，不會太甜還不錯。\n\n: This place features a lucky cat dessert as an appetizer, which is not too sweet and quite good.
translations.這家的神戶牛排我覺得普普通通，不太好咬也吃不太出神戶牛的味道，茶泡飯倒是蠻好吃的: I found their Kobe beef steak quite average; it was a bit tough and lacked the distinctive Kobe beef flavor. However, the chazuke (tea poured over rice) was quite tasty.
translations.這時候是先從虎航網站使用網路報到的優勢就來了，當天目測現場「一般報到」櫃檯大排長: This is when the advantage of using online check-in on the Tigerair website comes in. On that day, the "regular check-in" counters were visibly crowded, already full by 10:20 AM, with an estimated wait time of 45 minutes to 1 hour. The "self-service baggage drop" took less than 15 minutes to complete, saving a lot of waiting time.
translations.這時間前往足立美術館的人反而比較多。\n\n: At this time, there are actually more people visiting the Adachi Museum of Art.
translations.這次也一併從 KKday 買「 [**日本eSIM卡｜每日高速、總量、無限流量吃: This time, I also purchased the "[**Japan eSIM｜Daily High-Speed, Total Volume, Unlimited Data Plan｜65% Off**](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/137689-japan-high-speed-daily-unlimited-data-japanese-esim?cid=19365){:target="_blank"}" from KKday.
translations.這次也是 P 人發作，10 月中臨時抓到時間空檔，隨即安排 11/12 出發，1: This time it was another spontaneous trip. I found a free time slot in mid-October and immediately planned to depart on 11/12 and return on 11/18.
translations.這次也是長距離移動，必買 JR Pass，本來還怕只有山陰、山陽 JRass，沒: This trip also involved long-distance travel, so buying a JR Pass was a must. I initially worried there would only be passes for San'in or Sanyo, but JR Japan thoughtfully planned all possible routes. The "[**Kansai & San'in Area Rail Pass JRPass**](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/20307-jr-sanin-okayama-area-pass?cid=19365){:target="_blank"}" was just perfect for me!
translations.這次來走馬看花一下就走了。\n\n: This time, I just took a quick glance around and left.
translations.這次在第一航廈的 A1 登機門。(終於不用再搭擺渡車了)\n\n: This time at Terminal 1, Gate A1. (Finally no more shuttle buses)
translations.這次就沒搭八雲號了，搭 14:54 前往米子的普通區間車，照 Google Ma: This time, I didn't take the Yakumo train. I took the 14:54 local train to Yonago and followed Google Maps' suggestion to get off at Nogi Station, then walked to the Shinjiko Sunset Viewing Spot.
translations.這次很幸運地只有松江一晚沒訂到 [東橫 Inn](https://www.toy: This time, I was lucky to book all accommodations except for one night in Matsue, where I couldn't get a room at [Toyoko Inn](https://www.toyoko-inn.com/china/index2){:target="_blank"}.
translations.這次沒買什麼、沒買酒就 17 kg 了…但是我幾乎沒手提行李，全塞進去了。\n\: This time I didn’t buy much or any alcohol, yet it still reached 17 kg… but I hardly had any carry-on luggage; everything was packed inside.
translations.這次的行程安排太緊湊，很多地方都走馬看花，尤其前三天因為移動距離較長加上停留時間: This trip was too tight, and many places were just briefly visited. Especially in the first three days, due to long travel distances and short stays, I couldn't fully enjoy the beautiful scenery of Izumo and Matsue in Shimane. If I have the chance, I would like to go again to see the sunset, the autumn leaves, and the Kamiari Festival.
translations.這站沒什麼人、時間也還很早， [趁機錄了一段示範如何使用 JR Pass 預約指: This station was not crowded and it was still early, so I took the opportunity to record a short video demonstrating how to reserve a seat with the JR Pass. [Watch here](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/oG8xrxEC6mk){:target="_blank"}.
translations.這邊可以直接搭乘纜車到鳥取沙丘展望台，我想說先去下面吃有名的鳥取第一沙丘布丁，就: You can take the cable car directly to the Tottori Sand Dunes Observatory. I decided to first go down and try the famous Tottori No.1 Sand Dune Pudding, so I didn’t take the cable car. Later, I walked up since it was on the way and not far (about 15 minutes).
translations.這邊很大很好逛，幾乎所有品牌都有。\n\n: This place is very large and great for shopping, with almost all brands available.
translations.這邊很重要，根據 [JR Pass 關西＆山陰周遊券官網](https://ww: This is very important. According to the information provided by the [JR Pass Kansai & Sanin Area Pass official website](https://www.westjr.co.jp/global/tc/ticket/pass/kansai_sanin/){:target="_blank"}, the [**JR YAKUMO train to the Sanin region is all reserved seating**](https://www.westjr.co.jp/global/tc/ticket/pass/pdf/Reserved_seats_tc.pdf){:target="_blank"} **with no non-reserved seats ⚠️⚠️⚠️ (starting from March 16, 2024)**, so all seats must be reserved in advance.
translations.這邊路上也有一些餐廳可以吃飯，繼續往回走有一條小路，往上走一小段右邊就是沙丘美術: There are also some restaurants along this road. Continuing back, there is a small path; walk up a short distance and the Sand Dunes Museum second entrance is on the right. On the left, if you go up a bit further, you'll reach the "Tottori Sand Dunes Observatory" where the cable car arrives.
translations.逛完 LINKS 穿過大阪車站、樓上的時空廣場，直達大阪大丸百貨。\n\n: After visiting LINKS, walk through Osaka Station and the Time Square upstairs to reach Osaka Daimaru Department Store.
translations.逛完一圈又往上走回到剛剛的鳥取沙丘展望台，東晃西晃吃個鳥取梨冰淇淋大約 14:2: After walking around, I went back up to the Tottori Sand Dunes Observatory. Wandering around, I had a Tottori pear ice cream. Around 14:20, I waited at the bus stop for the 14:42 bus heading to Tottori Station.
translations.進入室內後同樣要脫鞋，會發一個塑膠袋裝鞋子。\n\n: After entering indoors, you also need to take off your shoes. A plastic bag will be given to store your shoes.
translations.進入神社後往左方看就會看到一根聳立的旗竿，上面是日本最大的日之丸國旗(約 75: After entering the shrine, look to the left to see a tall flagpole with Japan's largest Hinomaru flag (about 75 tatami mats, 137 square meters).
translations.遇到下班時間路上有點塞車，18:00 左右才到岡山車站。 **(比預期多 30: There was some traffic congestion during rush hour, so I arrived at Okayama Station around 18:00. **(30 minutes later than expected)**
translations.遊船回來走回來的方向，另一邊就是松江城入口，往上走就會到松江城。\n\n: After returning by boat and walking back, the entrance to Matsue Castle is on the other side. Walking uphill will lead you to Matsue Castle.
translations.選了一家主打鐵板豬排的店。\n\n: Chose a restaurant specializing in teppan pork cutlet.
translations.還好一路隔壁都沒人，自由座車廂看起來人比較多，指定席這邊大概才坐 6 成而已。\: Luckily, there was no one sitting next to me the whole way. The non-reserved cars looked more crowded, while the reserved seats were only about 60% full.
translations.還好只影響 10 分鐘，速速提領完行李飛奔巴士站。\n\n: Fortunately, it only affected 10 minutes. I quickly picked up my luggage and rushed to the bus stop.
translations.還有一個沙雕的沙丘美術館的 QR Code 可以掃描。\n\n: There is also a funny QR Code for the Sand Dunes Art Museum that you can scan.
translations.還有一隻海豹，但看起來場地太小他一直在繞圈圈QQ\n\n: There was also a seal, but the space seemed too small, so it kept swimming in circles QQ
translations.還有一點時間跑去超商買了兩個御飯糰、咖啡、炸雞帶著當午餐吃。\n\n: There was still some time, so I went to the convenience store to buy two rice balls, coffee, and fried chicken to take as lunch.
translations.降落日本後我們的日本 eSIM 應該就能收到訊號了。\n\n: After landing in Japan, our Japan eSIM should be able to receive a signal.
translations.除了份量有點小之外，這家的神戶牛味道還不錯。\n\n: Besides the portion being a bit small, the Kobe beef here tastes quite good.
translations.除了庭院，足立美術館核心還是館藏的諸多藝術品，禁止拍照，一路跟著動線觀賞藝術品，: Besides the gardens, the core of Adachi Museum of Art lies in its extensive art collection, where photography is prohibited. Follow the designated path to view the artworks along with the gardens.
translations.隨便吃了個牡蠣套餐。\n\n: Had a casual oyster set meal.
translations.雖然剛說沒什麼好逛，但至少扭蛋店還是有也有安利美特。\n\n: Although I just said there's not much to shop for, there is at least a gacha capsule toy store and an Animate shop.
translations.雖然只有一個航班但是因為機場小、工作人員少、只有一條線、檢查的也很細，所以排安檢: Although there was only one flight, the airport is small, has few staff, only one line, and strict checks, so security screening and departure took about 20–30 minutes.
translations.雖然場地小但是每個沙雕作品的細節都很精緻。\n\n: Although the venue is small, the details of each sand sculpture are very exquisite.
translations.雖然幾乎都有訂到東橫，但還是因為預定時間太晚只剩雙人房，所以一晚的價格比較高，如: Although I managed to book Toyoko Inn for almost all nights, some nights only had double rooms left due to late booking, so the price was higher. If I had booked a single room, the price could have been kept under NT$1,500 per night. However, based on past experience, even double rooms tend to sell out near the date, possibly because the location is less visited?
translations.離吃飯時間還有一個多小時，先在神戶三宮附近逛逛，一樣去找扭蛋跟 Kiddy La: There is still over an hour before mealtime, so I first wandered around near Kobe Sannomiya, looking for gacha capsules and Kiddy Land as usual.
translations.離吃飯時間還有一小時，先去附近的 AEON 逛逛。\n\n: There is still an hour before mealtime, so I went to the nearby AEON for a walk.
translations.離開後繼續走到下一站「大國町」搭一站到「動物園前」下車，前往通天閣。\n\n: After leaving, continue to the next station "Daikokucho," take one stop to "Dobutsuen-mae," and get off to head to Tsutenkaku.
translations.需要打電話給中華電信、確認個人資料後請客服解除鎖定。\n\n: You need to call Chunghwa Telecom and confirm your personal information with customer service to unlock the account.
translations.需要買門票入場，那時候沒仔細看只買了 **一般的入山志納金，無法乘坐來回交通車，: Tickets are required for entry. At that time, I only bought the **regular mountain admission fee, which does not include the round-trip shuttle bus, so you have to walk up the mountain**. ⚠️⚠️⚠️
translations.順路先去劃隔天到姬路的車票。\n\n: On the way, I first bought the train ticket for the next day to Himeji.
translations.順路買宵夜回飯店晚上吃，還有 Y1000 養樂多 1000，這次其實沒特別喝也都: Stopped by on the way to buy late-night snacks to eat back at the hotel. Also got a Y1000 Yakult 1000. This time, I didn't really drink it much but still slept well...
translations.鬆餅跟鹽味烤雞肉都很好吃。\n\n: The pancakes and the savory grilled chicken were both very delicious.
translations.鳥取和牛很嫩，但是牛味較少，第一吃純吃和牛沒什麼味道。\n\n: Tottori wagyu is very tender, but has a milder beef flavor. The first bite, eating pure wagyu, has little taste.
translations.鳥取沙丘真的有夠大，此時天空不作美有點陰雨，但如果是大太陽的話應該會很曬。\n\: The Tottori Sand Dunes are really vast. The sky was a bit gloomy and rainy at the time, but if it were sunny, it would probably be very hot.
translations.鳥取沙丘美術館，原價 800 日圓\n: Tottori Sand Dunes Museum, original price 800 yen
translations.鳥取站出站走 4 分鐘就會到\n\n: It takes a 4-minute walk from Tottori Station exit.
translations.鳥居上也堆滿了姻緣石。\n\n: The torii gate is also piled with matchmaking stones.
translations.點了一份鐵板豬排定食(200g)跟生啤。最後付 `2,178 日圓`\n\n: I ordered a 200g teppan pork cutlet set meal and a draft beer. The total came to `2,178 yen`.
translations.點了神戶牛排跟茶泡飯還有生啤。\n\n: Ordered Kobe beef steak, ochazuke, and draft beer.
translations.點擊「加入 eSIM」直接帶入啟用資訊啟用 eSIM\n: Click "Add eSIM" to directly load the activation information and activate the eSIM
translations.點擊自助報到後會前往虎航官網，確認旅客資料、行李安全，最後會產生、寄發「登機證」: Clicking self check-in will redirect you to the Tigerair website to confirm passenger details and baggage safety, then the boarding pass will be generated and sent.
